title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick — Page 63
raw_text:
To walk toward the dawn
 
With advice like that, how can I lose? (Seriously, she did sing that, but
what it means I have no idea. I don't even own any slippers. Two nights ago I
dreamed about the Goddess Aurora, who is the Greek Goddess of the Dawn. I
sure have odd nights.*)
Love,
Phil
work_title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick
